tools.name: search_monologues
tools.description: Search Shakespeare monologues by free text (matches character, play, or first line) plus optional filters. Returns matches, each with a permalink `url`.

tools.name: get_monologue
tools.description: Fetch one monologue's catalogue entry by its numeric id. Follow the returned `url` for the full text.

tools.name: random_monologue
tools.description: Return one random monologue, with optional gender/play filters. Useful for a suggestion when the user is undecided.

tools.name: list_plays
tools.description: List Shakespeare's plays with their classification (Comedy/History/Tragedy) and monologue counts.

tools.name: list_all_monologues_for_a_character
tools.description: List every monologue spoken by a given character (e.g. 'Hamlet', 'Rosalind'). Matches the character name exactly first, then as a substring.

tools.name: get_monologue_of_the_day
tools.description: The current 'Monologue of the Day' — the piece most recently posted to the site's social feeds.

tools.name: get_paraphrased_monologue
tools.description: Fetch a monologue's full text alongside its modern-English, line-by-line paraphrase. The paraphrase is AI-generated (Claude) and may be null if it hasn't been generated yet — the `url` always has the monologue itself.

tools.name: get_scene_summary
tools.description: Fetch an AI-generated summary of the scene a monologue appears in (context for the speech). May be null if not generated yet.

tools.name: get_play_summary
tools.description: Fetch an AI-generated summary of a play (e.g. 'Hamlet', 'The Tempest'). May be null if not generated yet.
